overrides.override_summary: Termination only for good cause; 30-day cure period required
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisee has stronger termination protection — franchisor must show good cause and allow cure

overrides.override_summary: Refusal to renew requires FMV compensation for inventory/supplies/equipment (under specified conditions: term <5 years and post-term noncompete exists or <6 months notice)
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisor cannot refuse renewal without compensating franchisee at fair market value

overrides.override_summary: Out-of-state arbitration or litigation prohibited
overrides.why_it_matters: Michigan franchisees should not be forced to arbitrate in Chicago — but franchisor states intent to enforce arbitration provision notwithstanding

overrides.override_summary: Required releases cannot deprive franchisee of rights under Michigan act
overrides.why_it_matters: Release at renewal/transfer is limited

overrides.override_summary: General release at renewal/transfer excludes Maryland Franchise Registration and Disclosure Law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: Maryland franchisees retain franchise law claims despite signing release

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee may bring action in Maryland for Maryland franchise law claims (subject to arbitration)
overrides.why_it_matters: Maryland franchisees not forced to litigate exclusively in Illinois for state law claims

overrides.override_summary: Maryland law applies to Maryland franchise law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: Illinois choice-of-law does not override Maryland franchise law protections

overrides.override_summary: Insolvency termination may not be enforceable under federal bankruptcy law
overrides.why_it_matters: Bankruptcy-based termination may be challenged

overrides.override_summary: 90 days' notice of termination (60-day cure) and 180 days' notice for non-renewal required
overrides.why_it_matters: Significantly longer notice and cure periods than FA's 10-30 day cure periods

overrides.override_summary: Liquidated damages/termination penalties may not be enforceable under Minn. Rule 2860.4400J
overrides.why_it_matters: Minnesota may void the massive liquidated damages formula

overrides.override_summary: Release at renewal/transfer excludes claims prohibited by Minnesota Franchises Law
overrides.why_it_matters: Release protection preserved

overrides.override_summary: Litigation cannot be required outside Minnesota; franchisee retains right to Minnesota courts (subject to arbitration)
overrides.why_it_matters: No forced Chicago venue for Minnesota franchisees

overrides.override_summary: Waiver of punitive damages and jury trial may be deleted if required by Minnesota law
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisee may retain punitive damages and jury trial rights

overrides.override_summary: Termination/liquidated damages provisions deemed 'unfair, unjust and inequitable' by Commissioner
overrides.why_it_matters: North Dakota Commissioner has formally flagged the liquidated damages as problematic — enforced only to extent law allows

overrides.override_summary: Release excludes claims under North Dakota Franchise Investment Law
overrides.why_it_matters: Release protection preserved

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration venue: mutually agreed site (not Chicago) if required by ND law (unless preempted by FAA)
overrides.why_it_matters: Potential relief from Chicago-only arbitration

overrides.override_summary: North Dakota law may apply if required by applicable law
overrides.why_it_matters: Illinois choice-of-law may not control

overrides.override_summary: Forum selection restricting venue to outside Rhode Island is void for RI Franchise Investment Act claims
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot force RI franchisees out of state for state law claims

overrides.override_summary: Choice of law provisions void to extent they conflict with RI Franchise Investment Act
overrides.why_it_matters: RI franchise law protections cannot be waived via IL choice-of-law

overrides.override_summary: Termination without reasonable cause is unlawful under Virginia Retail Franchising Act
overrides.why_it_matters: Additional protection against arbitrary termination
